channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: House lawmakers hold hearing to further investigate Florida insurance companies
item.description: House lawmakers gathered at the statehouse Friday for a hearing to look into a bombshell report that Florida insurance companies were "ripping off" Floridians and misleading the legislature, claiming to be broke.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump says he was being a 'bit sarcastic' when he promised to end Russia-Ukraine war in 24 hours
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President Donald Trump said Friday that he was “being a little bit sarcastic” when he repeatedly claimed as a candidate that he would have the Russia-Ukraine war solved within 24 hours — and even before he even took office.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ron Nessen, press secretary to President Ford, dies at 90
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Ron Nessen, a veteran broadcast journalist who was press secretary for President Gerald Ford and sought to restore the integrity that the position had lost during the Nixon administration, has died. He was 90.
item.dc:creator: DOUGLASS K. DANIEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge rules against advocates trying to help migrants sent to Guantanamo and to stop more transfers
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal judge ruled Friday against immigration and civil rights advocates attempting to help migrants who had been sent to the Guantanamo Bay military base — and trying to prevent further transfers — days after the Trump administration transferred all migrants out of the facility
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Leland Vittert’s War Notes: Infighting to Irrelevance
item.description: The current Democratic infighting and political malpractice over forcing or not forcing a government shutdown exposes a leaderless party that believes in opposing Donald Trump and issues that 80% of Americans agree with.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: Judges don't intervene after the Trump administration says it's stopped destroying USAID records
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Federal judges in two separate lawsuits refused Friday to order the Trump administration to not destroy U.S. Agency for International Development records after it said it has disposed of only old or unneeded documents and is no longer destroying records anyway.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST and JOHN HANNA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump environmental rollbacks would boost pollution and endanger lives, former EPA heads say
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Three former Environmental Protection Agency leaders sounded an alarm Friday, saying rollbacks proposed by EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin endanger the lives of millions of Americans and abandon the agency's dual mission to protect the environment and human health.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW DALY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: As 'match day' nears, med schools, lawmakers want to expand residencies to keep doctors in Nevada
item.description: On Friday, March 21 — just a week away — more than 40,000 medical students around the country will find out where they will be serving their residencies. About 300 of those graduates are from UNLV, UNR and Touro University, but there aren't enough residencies in the state to keep them here.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Migrant gangs put on notice after string of home burglaries
item.description: Lawmakers push the Department of Homeland Security to drop Chile from the visa waiver program, warning that gangs are exploiting it for organized burglaries in U.S. communities and businesses.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ICE arrests another individual who participated in anti-Israel Columbia protests
item.description: Immigration and Customs Enforcement officers arrested a second person who participated in the anti-Israel protests at Columbia University.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DHS revokes visa of one Columbia student, arrests another pro-Palestinian protester
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) announced Friday it has revoked the visa of one Columbia University student and arrested another person involved in the pro-Palestinian protests, escalating its crackdown on those engaged in demonstrations over the conflict in Gaza.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: Dr. Oz bats back Democratic attempts to paint him as a 'snake oil' salesman in Senate hearing
item.description: Dr. Mehmet Oz, President Donald Trump's pick to lead the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid, was slammed for promoting "snake oil remedies'" during a confirmation hearing Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Millions spent by Biden on COVID 'vaccine hesitancy' campaign slashed by Trump NIH: report
item.description: The Biden administration spent $267 million on research grants and contracts related to "misinformation" in 2021, a watchdog group found.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 60 percent of voters unhappy with DOGE handling of federal workers: Poll
item.description: Elon Musk and DOGE have been trying to slash their way through the federal government, offering buyouts to and laying off scores of workers. Many of their actions are now the subject of lawsuits.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump's approval dips amid concerns over economy: Poll
item.description: President Donald Trump’s approval rating has dropped a few points since he first took office, with voters increasingly expressing concerns over the state of the economy, according to a new poll.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, Fox 5
